title: Lassoed Hearts
description: A cheesy, feel-good story of a woman down on her luck in the big city. She returns home for the holidays and rediscovers her small town’s charms.
quote: Looks like this city girl finally learned how to throw a lasso.
parent: Adult Swim Yule Log 2: Branchin’ Out
altHero: curly red-haired woman holding a lasso that’s wrapped around a cowboy man
alt3: the cowboy looks at the woman
